title: Beautiful totem of undying
description: This is a resource pack on adding a 3D model for the totem of unduying. But in the inventory and in the hot bar there is a 2D texture
body:
[https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items)

The resource pack adds a 3D model for the immortality totem, similar to the model from Actions & Stuff. But there is a 2D texture in the inventory and in the hot bar.
